subject: AI Engineering Enablement Director — Mark Smalley
opening: I am writing to apply for the AI Engineering Enablement Director role at LSEG. I have spent the past year building production AI agent infrastructure while drawing on 15 years of financial services engineering experience. This role sits at the intersection of both.
body: I currently operate a production AI pipeline with 41 MCP tools, autonomous task orchestration, and LLM-augmented development workflows that ship framework-level architecture at solo-founder velocity. Before that, 15 years building regulated financial infrastructure: digital custody, settlement systems, and blockchain protocols for licensed operators. The combination of hands-on AI engineering and institutional fintech delivery is exactly what this role requires.
closing: I am based in the UK, immediately available, and open to London hybrid arrangements. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my AI engineering and financial services background maps to what LSEG is building.
body_email:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the AI Engineering Enablement Director role at LSEG. I have spent the past year building production AI agent infrastructure while drawing on 15 years of financial services engineering experience.

I currently operate a production AI pipeline with 41 MCP tools, autonomous task orchestration, and LLM-augmented development workflows that ship framework-level architecture at solo-founder velocity. Before that, 15 years building regulated financial infrastructure: digital custody, settlement systems, and blockchain protocols for licensed operators.

The combination of hands-on AI engineering and institutional fintech delivery is exactly what this role requires.

I am based in the UK, immediately available, and open to London hybrid arrangements.

Kind regards,
Mark Smalley
